blocks.text: Barbara Banks, copying Cynthia Hart and Nicole Griffin:

A short update and one request on the commercial review of {{fact:f:E-2015-001.client}}. The first tranche of the target's commercial data is in, and Cynthia Hart has it filed with the exhibit shells started. The reference list is agreed, and the first customer calls are set for the next two weeks. That is where most of the read on revenue quality will come from, so we would rather hold those slots firmly than move them.

The one item still open is the customer revenue breakdown by account for the last three years. We can begin from the summary you sent, but the account-level cut is what lets us test concentration and retention properly, which is the heart of the assignment. If your finance team can send it this week, we stay on schedule. Nicole Griffin is tracking that request with the others and can chase it directly if that is easier for your office.
Nothing else is needed from you today. I will send the confirmed reference schedule once the last two calls are booked, so the introductions from Johnson, Lopez and Brooks can go out ahead of them.
